title: Jamaican Hash Browns
description: A spicy twist on a classic side dish, these Jamaican hash browns are perfect for breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: Spicy seasoning
ingredients.notes: hot sauce or red pepper flakes

instructions: Grate the potato using a box grater or food processor.
Squeeze out as much liquid from the grated potato as possible using a cheesecloth or paper towels.
In a large bowl, combine the grated potato, hash (if using), and spicy seasoning. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown, flipping halfway through.
